The real challenge

You know BTP. But can you explain it like an architect?

The P_BTPA exam doesn't just test knowledge — it tests your ability to make architectural decisions and explain trade-offs like you've delivered enterprise BTP solutions.

Challenge 01

"I know the concepts but can't explain them."

You've built on BTP but never articulated architecture decisions. The exam tests your ability to communicate why one design choice beats another — under pressure, that's harder than you think.

Challenge 02

"The scenario questions are unpredictable."

Real exam questions show you a messy business problem and ask how you'd architect the solution. That's different from memorizing definitions — you need to think like an architect.

Challenge 03

"I haven't seen these coverage areas before."

BTP covers Cloud Foundry, Kyma, CAP, Security, Governance, Clean Core strategy and more. You need organized, topic-by-topic practice with explanations so you understand every domain.

What's inside

Your complete BTP architecture exam system.

400+ questions organized by architecture domain, with detailed explanations that teach you the reasoning behind every correct answer.

RESOURCE 01

200 Foundation Q&A

Comprehensive questions covering all P_BTPA exam domains: architecture design, integration, security protocols, lifecycle management, governance frameworks, and clean core strategy.

  • Questions organized by architectural domain
  • Detailed explanations for every answer
  • Real enterprise scenarios
RESOURCE 02

200 Popular & Predicted Exam Questions

Questions based on actual P_BTPA exam patterns, curated from recent certification attempts and exam updates. These are the scenarios and decision-points that actually get tested.

  • Architecture decision scenarios
  • Integration pattern questions
  • Security and governance challenges
RESOURCE 03

Architecture Coverage Breakdown

A structured guide to every architecture domain on the exam: Cloud Foundry, Kyma, CAP, Destinations, Integration, Security, Lifecycle, and Governance.

  • Domain-by-domain breakdown
  • Decision framework for each topic
  • Common exam patterns explained
RESOURCE 04

Real-World BTP Scenarios

Actual enterprise scenarios — the kind that separate architects who have delivered projects from candidates who just memorized definitions.

  • Business problem → architecture solution
  • Trade-off analysis practice
  • Interview-style deep dives

Questions

Frequently asked questions

What exam does this prepare for?

This kit is designed for the SAP Certified – Solution Architect – SAP BTP certification (exam codes P_BTPA and P_BTPA_2408). It covers all exam domains including architecture design, integration, security, lifecycle management, governance and clean core strategy.

How many questions are included?

400+ questions total: 200 foundation Q&A covering all exam domains, plus 200 popular and predicted exam questions based on actual P_BTPA certification patterns.

Is this a replacement for training?

This kit is best used alongside official SAP training and documentation. It excels at exam-focused practice and helps you understand the reasoning behind architectural decisions — essential for the certification.

Do I get lifetime updates?

Yes. It's a one-time payment with lifetime access and free lifetime updates. When new exam patterns or topics emerge, they're added to your kit at no extra cost.

How soon do I get access?

Immediately. As soon as your purchase completes, you get instant access to all resources on school.srini.pro.

What's your refund policy?

We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied for any reason, email us for a full refund within 7 days of purchase.

Your P_BTPA certification exam is one prepared session away.

400+ questions with architectural explanations. Everything you need to pass on the first attempt and understand BTP at the solution architect level.
